title: The Significance of Missing Gamma Ray Values
content: Good morning! I was having a first look at the data tonight, and I noticed that for some entries, the gamma ray column is actually blank. Is this because radiation was low/zero/insignificant, or simply because a measurement was not taken or recorded at that point?

comments.content: Gamma is blank due to the nature of the drilling process, for some intervals Gamma cannot be measured

replies.content: That's interesting. Thank you! As an engineer, I'm a little curious: what's the constraint?
